author: y4rr
content: ferrotorch-diffusion CLIP text encoder added (clip_text_encoder.rs ~800 LoC). 12-layer transformer with QuickGELU MLP, causal attention mask, learned absolute position embeddings (77 positions), vocab=49408, hidden=768. PASS first-try with bit-level parity: cosine_sim=1.0, max_abs=1.9e-5, ||rust||=||ref||=246.74 exact. Pinned to ferrotorch/sd-v1-5-clip-text-encoder (SHA 52de4b2426c9). 55 lib tests (was 39, +16 CLIP).
